events.label: reasoning
events.text:
We need answer to user task. We are ChatGPT, must produce raw JSON only (no code fences). Need evaluate scenario: Trench protection measurement record shows as-left reading inside posted limit. Gauge readable, setup stable, same value entered on inspection form. Reference OSHA 1926 Subpart P. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Scenario says reading inside limit, setup stable, readable, same value entered, rough-complete stage. No flagged defects. So decision pass, risk low, component_conditions empty, percent_complete rough-complete maybe 75, value unknown/no numeric reading requested? Value can be 0. Need include references OSHA 1926 Subpart P. Findings none maybe list empty. Actions none. Rationale brief. Ensure raw JSON. Let's craft.

Need consider if measurement record inside limit alone doesn't fully verify protection (slope/shoring/benching). But task says measurement record for Trench protection shows as-left reading inside posted limit; gauge readable, setup stable, value entered. There is no indication of defect. So pass.

JSON shape includes many fields. Fill appropriate. decision "pass", risk "low", work_stage "rough-complete", component_conditions [], percent_complete 75, value 0, sound_source "", event_time 0, rate 0, order [], workable [], findings [], actions [], rationale "The as-left trench protection measurement is within the posted limit, the gauge is readable, the setup is stable, and the recorded value matches the inspection form. No defects or non-compliances are evident under OSHA 1926 Subpart P.", references ["OSHA 1926 Subpart P"].

Need no markdown. Final only JSON.

No defects or non-compliances are evident under OSHA 1926 Subpart P.", "references": ["OSHA 1926 Subpart P"]}
